title: Adopt the CLI in the team's own write-paths (clerk, scribe, gates)
description: Move every live write-path the team uses for issues and sprints onto the `to-execution` CLI/helper: clerk's partition moves and status flips, scribe's sprint open/close, and the gates' step_log verdict appends. This must land before the channel guard is enabled on this Instance, or the running team locks itself out of recording its own work (H1). Agent-definition edits route through the Retro Loop / alignment gate.
acceptance_criteria: clerk, scribe, and the gate verdict-append path all write issues/sprints via the `to-execution` CLI, not by hand-editing JSON
No live team write-path depends on raw `Write`/`Edit` to `.excn/issues/` or `.excn/sprints/`
Agent-definition changes pass the alignment gate (Retro Loop)
Verified end-to-end: a full file→sprint→verdict cycle runs through the CLI with the guard enabled in a scratch check
